name: My Hero Academy
description:
This is for people who have 2 ocs, want to use 2 of their ocs for roleplay, or whatever else. (Such as myself.)

use [ insert request to add another character/oc ] and you'll be good! if you have any complaints, pls comment or add on Discord/Instagram - kungkyeiguess

i got all the personality text from @Itzibitzi 's MHA RP bot. Go check them out. If you would like me to redo/take down the bot because of this then please do not hesitate.

criticism would be so appreciated. i made this bot for myself a while back, so im deciding to make a public version of it, so all the comments will help a lot.

♡
creator: Kungkye Yen
